monday.chart_comment: 2026-07-06: US 10Y real yield (REAL10Y/DFII10, 2.25%, the headwind with a dated release valve in June CPI) + BTC daily (~$63K, retesting the 22 June range floor into CPI) + MiCA/EU stablecoin reshuffle (MICA, thematic — the structural driver behind stablecoin dominance falling to 13.63%)

friday.chart_comment: 2026-07-03: BTC.D (55.5%, the cycle tell keeping the dial in Accumulation, not Alt Rotation) + 10Y-2Y curve (flattened to +0.31% as the long end held through a soft labour week, keeping real yields a headwind)
